Here we go again - they're showing me a 'simple pricing structure' but I don't see integration costs, training fees, or what happens when we need to connect this to our WMS. I need to see the real total cost.
These case studies look good but are they from companies our size? We can't afford another situation where the software works great for startups but falls apart when handling our volume.

This navigation is already confusing me - if I can't figure out their basic product flow, how complicated is their actual implementation going to be? I don't have time for another manual process nightmare.
They want my email before showing me technical specifications? Red flag. I need to see integration requirements and API documentation upfront, not get locked into a sales funnel.
Finally, someone who actually understands that we need automated data extraction and real-time inventory visibility. This looks like it might actually solve our fragmented operations problem.
